extension.summary: LibTV - Your Kodi Library as Real TV
extension.description: Turn your movies and TV shows into linear channels with full TV guide support. Generates an M3U playlist and XMLTV guide for PVR IPTV Simple Client, with plugin-resolved streams so channels play whatever is currently on air.
extension.news:
v0.7.7: fix the EPG overlay being completely invisible — a code-only WindowDialog draws no background of its own, and the ControlList had no explicit text colors, so it opened and closed correctly (confirmed via log + double-Esc test) but rendered nothing on screen. Added a small bundled background image behind the list plus explicit text/selected colors so rows are legible over playing video.
v0.7.6: add diagnostic log lines (LibTV: overlay.show() invoked / showing N channel row(s) / overlay closed / selected channel X) around the EPG overlay, since two silent-ish failures in a row made it hard to tell "RunScript never fired" apart from "it ran fine but nothing visible happened" from kodi.log alone. No behavior change.
v0.7.5: fix the EPG overlay not accepting focus — setFocus() was called from __init__, before the window was shown, which Kodi logs as "Control N in window M has been asked to focus, but it can't" with no traceback. Focus is now set from onInit(), the documented hook for a hand-built window that's actually been shown.
